notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Tyler Callihan. Michael Busch to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ singles on a ground ball to shortstop Jared Triolo. Michael Busch scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Jared Triolo.
